narrativeProgression.summary: Recovered recordings reveal contradiction between public narrative and private orders.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.

threadUpdates.update: Confrontation Protocol: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.
Peripheral signal tied to Water-damage restoration invoice remains unresolved.
Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Water-damage restoration invoice.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
NPC language mirrors player choices with unsettling precision.

evidenceDrops.title: The Fourth Tenant - Day 23 medical record
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Water-damage restoration invoice.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: The Fourth Tenant ARG artifact Day 23. Type: medical_record. Clue focus: Water-damage restoration invoice. Location: Flood-district prewar apartment block. Phase: Resolution or Psychological Break. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: The Fourth Tenant medical_record audio cue for day 23. Clue anchor: Water-damage restoration invoice. Phase: Resolution or Psychological Break. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Water-damage restoration invoice and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_22.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Water-damage restoration invoice.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.
I watched your response window close. If you still want the living truth, compare day 03 to today before sunrise.

puzzle.title: Day 23 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Water-damage restoration invoice.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with WATE.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
